# Strait TypeScript SDK

> Official TypeScript/Node.js SDK for the Strait job orchestration platform. Provides Effect and Promise-based APIs, authoring DSL, composition helpers, FSM state machines, and 186 API operations across 19 services.

## Installation

- `npm install @strait/sdk` or `yarn add @strait/sdk` or `pnpm add @strait/sdk`

## Client Creation

- `createClient({ baseUrl, apiKey })`: Create client with inline options
- `createClient(configFromEnv())`: Create client from STRAIT_BASE_URL + STRAIT_API_KEY environment variables
- `createClient(configFromFile())`: Create client from strait.json configuration file

## Services (19)

- `client.jobs`: Jobs — list, create, get, update, delete, clone, getHealth, trigger, bulkTrigger, listVersions, getVersion, listDependencies, createDependency, deleteDependency, batch, batchDisable, batchEnable
- `client.runs`: Runs — list, get, delete, listCheckpoints, getChildren, debug, getDebugBundle, listDependencyStatus, dlqReplay, listEvents, deleteIdempotencyKey, getLineage, listOutputs, replay, reschedule, listToolCalls, getUsage, bulkCancel, bulkCancelAll, bulkDlqReplay, bulkReplay, getDlq
- `client.workflows`: Workflows — list, create, get, update, delete, clone, dryRun, plan, simulate, trigger, getGraph, getGraphByWorkflowId, listRuns, listVersions, getVersion, getDiff, getPolicy, upsertPolicy, getExplain, listLabels, getImpact, listStepsByVersion
- `client.workflowRuns`: WorkflowRuns — list, get, delete, pause, resume, retry, listSteps, approveStep, retryStep, skipStep, forceCompleteStep, replaySubtreeStep, bulkCancel, bulkReplay
- `client.deployments`: Deployments — list, create, finalize, promote, rollback
- `client.environments`: Environments — list, create, get, update, delete, listVariables
- `client.secrets`: Secrets — list, create, delete
- `client.apiKeys`: APIKeys — list, create, delete, rotate
- `client.webhooks`: Webhooks — listSubscriptions, createSubscription, deleteSubscription, listDeliveries, getDelivery, retryDelivery
- `client.eventTriggers`: EventTriggers — listEvents, getEvent, deleteEvent, sendEvent, sendPrefix, purgeEvent, getStat
- `client.eventSources`: EventSources — list, create, get, update, delete, subscribe, listSubscriptions, deleteSubscription, dispatchEvent
- `client.batchOperations`: BatchOperations — list, get
- `client.stats`: Stats — list
- `client.analytics`: Analytics — getPerformance
- `client.logDrains`: LogDrains — list, create, get, update, delete
- `client.sdkRuns`: SDKRuns — annotateRun, checkpointRun, completeRun, continueRun, failRun, heartbeatRun, logRun, outputRun, progressRun, spawnRun, toolCallRun, usageRun, waitForEventRun
- `client.rbac`: RBAC — listAuditEvents, listMembers, createMember, deleteMember, bulkMember, listRoles, createRole, getRole, updateRole, deleteRole, listResourcePolicies, createResourcePolicy, deleteResourcePolicy, listTagPolicies, createTagPolicy, deleteTagPolicy, seedRoles
- `client.jobGroups`: JobGroups — list, create, get, update, delete, listJobs, pauseAll, resumeAll, getStats
- `client.health`: Health — list, getReady, listMetrics

## Authoring DSL

- `defineJob({ name, slug, endpointUrl, ... })`: Define a job with lifecycle handlers (run, onSuccess, onFailure, onStart)
- `defineWorkflow({ name, slug, steps, ... })`: Define a workflow with DAG steps
- `jobStep(ref, jobId, options)`: Create a job step for workflow DAG
- `approvalStep(ref, options)`: Create an approval gate step
- `subWorkflowStep(ref, workflowId, options)`: Create a sub-workflow step
- `waitForEventStep(ref, eventKey, options)`: Create a wait-for-event step
- `sleepStep(ref, durationSecs, options)`: Create a sleep step
- `validateDag(steps)`: Validate DAG using Kahn's topological sort

## Composition Helpers

- `withRetry(fn, { attempts, delayMs, factor, maxDelayMs, jitter })`: Retry with exponential backoff
- `waitForRun(runId, getRun, { timeoutMs, initialDelayMs, maxDelayMs, factor })`: Poll until terminal
- `triggerAndWait(input, triggerFn, getRun, { ... })`: Trigger + wait combined
- `paginate(listFn, { limit })`: Cursor-based pagination iterator
- `withIdempotency(headers, key)`: Add Idempotency-Key header
- `createAndFinalizeDeployment(client, body)`: Create + finalize deployment
- `createFinalizePromoteDeployment(client, body)`: Create + finalize + promote deployment

## FSM State Machines

- `canTransitionRun(from, event)`: Check if run transition is valid
- `transitionRun(from, event)`: Execute run state transition
- `isTerminalRunStatus(status)`: Check if run status is terminal
- `canTransitionWorkflowRun(from, event)`: Check workflow run transition
- `canTransitionStepRun(from, event)`: Check step run transition

## Error Types

- `TransportError`: Network failures
- `DecodeError`: JSON parse failures
- `ValidationError`: Config/input validation
- `UnauthorizedError`: 401/403
- `NotFoundError`: 404
- `ConflictError`: 409
- `RateLimitedError`: 429
- `ApiError`: Other HTTP errors
- `TimeoutError`: Polling timeout
- `DagValidationError`: DAG validation failures

## Middleware

- `{ onRequest, onResponse, onError }`: Hook into request lifecycle
